title: BigBear.ai Holdings Inc (BBAI) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: BigBear.ai Holdings Inc (BBAI) Q3 2024 Earnings Preview. Q3 2024 Release Date: November 5, 2024. Consensus Estimates for Q3 2024: Revenue: $46.03 million, EPS: -$0.07 per share. Full Year 2024 Projections: Revenue: $175.42 million, EPS: -$0.77 per share. Notable Trends: Revenue expectations have grown over the past 90 days, with full-year 2024 estimates increasing from $171.77 million to $175.42 million. Looking ahead, 2025 revenue projections rose from $195.69 million to $203.35 million. Recent Performance Context: In Q2 2024 (ended June 30), the company missed revenue expectations significantly. Actual revenue was $39.78 million, which missed analysts' revenue expectations of $46.548 million by -14.53%. However, earnings performance was stronger than anticipated at -$0.05 per share versus -$0.07 expected. Analyst Outlook: The average 12-month price target from four analysts stands at $2.63, suggesting potential upside of 66.14% from the current $1.58 price. The consensus recommendation rating is 2.4, indicating Outperform status.
